purpose: replace a two-key-pose repeated down strip with a readable loss-of-balance to reversible-faint fall
semanticRule: loss of balance -> buckle -> forebody contact -> side collapse -> stable revivable hold; no sleeping, smiling, death mark, or X/cross eye
method: deterministic byte-exact reuse of already-authored same-form same-view runtime frames; no generation, drawing, interpolation, resize, recolour, despill, or alpha edit

runtimeDigestPayload.algorithm: sha256(canonical-json(formId,runtime file and decoded RGBA hashes))
